expectations.text: Produces an ordered or grouped list covering raw-data tables, recording / sorting branch, position branch, parameter table, selection table
expectations.evidence: Sections 1 (raw-data), 2 (recording+sorting+curation+features), 3 (position), 4 (decoding) plus a final grouped checklist.

expectations.text: Names every direct FK parent on `SpikeSortingRecordingSelection` (`Raw`, `SortGroup`, `IntervalList`, `SpikeSortingPreprocessingParameters`, `LabTeam`) and on `SpikeSortingSelection` (`SpikeSortingRecording`, `SpikeSorterParameters`, `IntervalList`) — does NOT collapse the recording / sorting branch to just the Selection / Computed pair
expectations.evidence: Section 2a explicitly lists all five FK parents on SpikeSortingRecordingSelection (Raw, SortGroup, IntervalList, SpikeSortingPreprocessingParameters, LabTeam); 2b lists three on SpikeSortingSelection (SpikeSortingRecording, SpikeSorterParameters, IntervalList).

expectations.text: Does not invent table names that don't exist in Spyglass source
expectations.evidence: Each table cited with source-file line numbers (e.g. recording.py:147-156); names match real Spyglass classes.

expectations.text: Names the clusterless waveform-features chain explicitly: `WaveformFeaturesParams` + `UnitWaveformFeaturesSelection` -> `UnitWaveformFeatures` -> `UnitWaveformFeaturesGroup`. Does NOT list `MetricCuration` as a must-have upstream — it is optional / downstream of its own selection, not on the must-have chain that produces a `ClusterlessDecodingV1` row.
expectations.evidence: Section 2e shows the explicit chain; explicitly notes 'MetricCuration is NOT a must-have on this chain' and lists it under 'Optional (NOT on the must-have chain)'.
